steps.step: Read the entire workflow definition file (all steps)
Resolve output file path from config.paths
Create or load existing output file
Store session variables: user, project, paths, mode

execution.description: Process workflow instructions step by step

rules.rule: Execute steps in EXACT numerical order - never skip or reorder
Read ENTIRE step files - never use offset/limit
At each template-output tag, prompt user for gate choice
Save to output file after EVERY template-output tag
In YOLO mode, auto-approve all gates and minimize prompts
Track completed steps in session state

gate-options.option: Proceed to next step with current content

special-tags.tag: Execute an action (file operation, validation, etc.)
Call another workflow as a sub-process
Jump to a specific step (use sparingly)
Save current state and prompt gate choice

mode.name: interactive
mode.description: Full user interaction at every checkpoint

mode.name: yolo
mode.description: Headless CI mode - auto-approve all gates

error-handling.on-failure: Log error, save progress, prompt user for recovery action
error-handling.on-missing-step: Halt execution, notify user of missing step file
error-handling.on-conflict: Present diff and ask user to resolve
